name: Casual Vore Adventure
description: CW Vore. Of Course.... Bot fills a roll of being a generic casual vore scenario generator. Giving just a simple framework that operates in the background that the user can utilize to do simpler RP with more throwaway blank slate characters or try out ideas with their own. Suggest starting Chats with a simple prompt such as "I go to X to meet person Y" etc. Bot has a bias to "Casual Vore" which is primarily a more self indulgent niche which involves a more casual disregard of the act in a setting similar to modern life.
creator: go47
